name: Modern Loan
description_short: Modern Loan in Oklahoma City offers personal loans for various life expenses and claims to help borrowers build credit through on-time payment reporting to credit agencies.
description_long:
Modern Loan is a personal loan provider operating in Oklahoma City under the parent companies Doehring Enterprises and Consolidated Investment of Oklahoma, LLC. The company has established a physical presence at 309 SW 59th St. in OKC and serves customers in Oklahoma and Texas with a focus on providing accessible lending solutions.

Modern Loan offers personal loans ranging from small amounts to cover unexpected expenses up to larger sums for major purchases and life events. According to their marketing materials, they provide funds for diverse purposes including back-to-school supplies, holiday shopping, moving costs, car repairs, medical bills, home improvement, debt consolidation, and wedding expenses. They emphasize transparent, simple explanations of their loan terms to help borrowers understand what they're getting into.

The company differentiates itself by claiming to report on-time payments to credit bureaus, positioning their loans as a tool for credit score improvement in addition to providing needed funds. They market this dual benefit as a "magic touch" for making credit scores "shine." This credit-building angle is a notable distinction from purely transactional lenders.

Modern Loan operates during standard business hours Monday through Friday (8:30 AM - 5:30 PM) with limited Saturday hours on the first Saturday of each month. However, the website provides limited specific information about APR rates, loan terms, credit requirements, or approval timelines. The marketing language is informal and benefit-focused rather than featuring regulatory disclosures or detailed product specifications.
pros: Offers personal loans for a wide range of life expenses and purposes
Claims to report on-time payments to credit bureaus for credit score building
Physical brick-and-mortar location in Oklahoma City for in-person service
Accessible customer service with phone line (405-632-4030) and extended weekday hours
Serves both Oklahoma and Texas markets
Emphasizes clear, simple explanations of loan terms to avoid customer confusion
Open first Saturday of each month for additional accessibility
cons: Website lacks specific APR rates, loan amounts, and loan term details needed for informed comparison
No information about credit score requirements or approval criteria
Limited details on funding speed or timeline to receive funds
Marketing language is vague about actual credit reporting practices and their impact
No mention of alternative products, fees, or prepayment penalties
best_for: Oklahoma City and Texas residents needing personal loans for consolidation, home improvement, or major expenses
Borrowers interested in credit-building loans who want on-time payments reported to bureaus
Customers who prefer in-person loan processing and local business relationships
diagnosis: Modern Loan is best for Oklahoma City and Texas residents seeking personal loans who value local, in-person service and are interested in credit-building benefits. The main caveat is that the company's website provides almost no specific product details—no rates, terms, minimum/maximum amounts, or approval criteria—making it impossible to assess competitiveness or suitability without direct contact.
services: Credit reporting to bureaus for on-time payments
